title: Proactive Preparation and Hardening Against Destructive Attacks: 2026 Edition

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — Proactive Preparation and Hardening Against Destructive Atta
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/15
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_ip:
        dst_ip:
            - '1.3.6.1'
            - '2.5.29.37'
            - '5.2.3.4'
            - '5.5.7.3'
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*details.aspx*'
            - '*gpo-listing-all.csv*'
            - '*hostd.log*'
            - '*pfirewall.log*'
            - '*shell.log*'
            - '*snapshot.removeall*'
            - '*vim.event*'
            - '*vpxa.log*'
            - '*vpxd.log*'
            - '*vshphere.local*'
    condition: selection_ip or selection_dns
level: high
suricata: alert ip any any -> 1.3.6.1 any (msg:"CDB APEX — Proactive_Preparation_and_Hard"; sid:7924768; rev:1;)
alert ip any any -> 2.5.29.37 any (msg:"CDB APEX — Proactive_Preparation_and_Hard"; sid:8780079; rev:1;)
alert ip any any -> 5.2.3.4 any (msg:"CDB APEX — Proactive_Preparation_and_Hard"; sid:4609587; rev:1;)
alert ip any any -> 5.5.7.3 any (msg:"CDB APEX — Proactive_Preparation_and_Hard"; sid:9035396; rev:1;)
snort: alert ip any any -> 1.3.6.1 any (msg:"CDB APEX Proactive_Preparation_and_Hard"; sid:9003964; rev:1;)
alert ip any any -> 2.5.29.37 any (msg:"CDB APEX Proactive_Preparation_and_Hard"; sid:7327662; rev:1;)
alert ip any any -> 5.2.3.4 any (msg:"CDB APEX Proactive_Preparation_and_Hard"; sid:5851440; rev:1;)
alert ip any any -> 5.5.7.3 any (msg:"CDB APEX Proactive_Preparation_and_Hard"; sid:5660977; rev:1;)
